rules.detail: All synthetic gate task/run/receipt/plan/domain evidence ids MUST start with synth-gate-
Never write bearer/token/secret to receipts, logs, or fixtures
Never DROP DATABASE; board-scoped delete of synth-gate-* rows or reseed only
cleanup plan: runs → stage_evidence → g5 domain rows → classification receipts → tasks → reconciler dryrun hashes for board
Board-wide restore is operator disposable-snapshot — not default for gate pack

steps: DELETE runs WHERE run_id LIKE 'synth-gate-%' AND board_id = :boardId
DELETE stage_evidence WHERE receipt_id LIKE 'synth-gate-%' AND board_id = :boardId
DELETE g5_domains WHERE domain_scope LIKE 'synth-gate-%' OR evidence_receipt_id LIKE 'synth-gate-%'
DELETE classification WHERE task_id LIKE 'synth-gate-%' AND board_id = :boardId
DELETE tasks WHERE task_id LIKE 'synth-gate-%' AND board_id = :boardId
CLEAR reconciler dry_run/apply hashes for board if packet-only
cleanupPlanTemplate.note: Template only — seed-gates.mjs emits deterministic cleanup JSON; live SQL apply is operator-gated
